title: narcissus minor var. provincialis
intro: Narcissus minor var. provincialis, also known as the Provençal Jonquil or Jonquille de Provence, is a variety of the Narcissus minor plant, a small, bulbous perennial that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic and expectorant properties, which help to soothe coughs and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Narcissus minor var. provincialis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs and flowers are often dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
